name: winui-skills-plugin
description: Codex skills for WinUI 2, WinUI 3, and WinUI 2 to 3 migration.

interface.shortDescription: Build and migrate WinUI 2 and WinUI 3 apps.
interface.longDescription: Codex guidance for production WinUI development, including WinUI 2 for UWP, WinUI 3 with Windows App SDK, XAML/MVVM review practices, and migration planning from WinUI 2 or UWP-style apps to WinUI 3.
defaultPrompt: Review this WinUI view and view model.
Migrate this WinUI 2 page to WinUI 3.
Create a WinUI 3 MVVM settings page.
